cancelledState.description: For system use to handle canellation flow

isCancelled.description: Used by payment provides to indicate that cancellation operation has completed

captureDetails.description: Provides information about the charge that customers see on their statements. If Seller provides this information, a payment provider can implement it.

closeTransaction.description: Set to True to close a transaction, restricting future capture operations against this order; otherwise, set to False. By default, False.

shoppingCartId.description: The base shopping cart ID the order was created with

isPrototype.description: This checkbox determines whether the order is a prototype

purchaseOrderNumber.description: The order internal number provided by customer

subscriptionNumber.description: Number of subscription associated with this order

subscriptionId.description: The ID of subscription associated with this order

discountAmount.description:
When a discount is applied to the order, the tax calculation has already been applied and is shown in the tax field.
Therefore, the discount will not be taking tax into account. 
For instance, if the cart subtotal is $100, and the tax subtotal is $15, a 10% discount will yield a total of $105 ($100 subtotal – $10 discount + $15 tax).

subTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the item prices with tax

subTotalDiscount.description: Amount of the item discount total

subTotalDiscountWithTax.description: Amount of the item discount total with tax

subTotalTaxTotal.description: Amount of the item tax total

shippingTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the shipment total with tax

shippingSubTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the shipment prices with tax

shippingDiscountTotal.description: Amount of the shipment discount amounts

shippingDiscountTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the shipment discount amounts with tax

paymentTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the payment totals with tax

paymentSubTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the payment prices with tax

paymentDiscountTotal.description: Amount of the payments discount amounts

paymentDiscountTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the payment discount amounts with tax

discountTotal.description: Amount of the discount amounts of items, shipments and payments, and the order discount amount

discountTotalWithTax.description: Amount of the discount amounts with tax of items, shipments and payments, and the order discount amount with tax

fee.description: Any extra fees applied to the order. This value comes from the cart

feeWithTax.description: Order fee with applied tax factor

feeTotal.description: Amount of the order fee, as well as any item, shipment, and payment fees

feeTotalWithTax.description: Total fee with applied tax factor

taxTotal.description: Amount of tax totals for items, shipments, and payments without the order discount amount with tax factor applied
